trades.risk_notes: Late-quarter data could boost final BEA estimate above nowcasts

trades.catalyst: March CPI at 0.9% driven by energy, economists expect 0.3-0.4pp higher April due to oil shock
trades.risk_notes: Ceasefire could moderate energy prices faster than expected

trades.market: CPI inflation above 3.5% for year ending April 2026
trades.catalyst: March CPI at 3.3% plus expected April energy surge from Iran war
trades.risk_notes: Base effects could moderate if oil shock temporary

avoid.reason: Insufficient grounding data for reliable probability estimates

notes: Macro regime classified as inflationary due to March CPI surge to 3.3% driven by Iran war oil shock. Fed in hawkish hold posture with CME FedWatch showing 77% probability of no cuts in 2026. Q1 GDP nowcasts divergent but trending toward slower growth. Energy-driven inflation spike expected to persist into April.
